name: S3 Cross-Region Replication Setup
description: Configure S3 cross-region replication for disaster recovery and data locality

template.description: Setting up S3 cross-region replication from {{sourceBucket}} in {{sourceRegion}} to {{targetRegion}}. Total data size: {{dataSize}} TB. Replication will include existing objects (batch replication) and new objects. Configuring replication rules, IAM roles, and monitoring for replication lag.
template.currentState: S3 bucket '{{sourceBucket}}' in {{sourceRegion}} with {{dataSize}} TB of data. Versioning not enabled. No replication configured. Objects include application data, user uploads, and backups. Lifecycle policies for archival to Glacier after 90 days.
template.proposedState: Versioning enabled on source bucket. Replication rule created to replicate all objects to {{targetRegion}}. IAM replication role configured. S3 Batch Replication job for existing {{dataSize}} TB. Replication metrics and CloudWatch alarms for monitoring lag.
template.trafficPatterns: Continuous uploads throughout the day. Average 1000 new objects/hour. Object sizes range from 1 KB to 5 GB. Read-heavy workload with CloudFront CDN. Critical for application functionality and compliance requirements.
